schedules.label: Nightly memory consolidation
schedules.description: Reviews session transcripts at 3am, extracts decisions and learnings, and rebuilds MEMORY.md.
schedules.prompt: Run memory consolidation: spawn the memory-consolidator agent to review today's session transcripts, extract key decisions/learnings/preferences, update topic files in memory/topics/, and rebuild memory/MEMORY.md index.

setup_scripts.label: Initialize memory directories
setup_scripts.description: Creates memory/topics/ and an empty MEMORY.md so the consolidator agent has somewhere to write.
setup_scripts.command:
mkdir -p memory/topics && [ -f memory/MEMORY.md ] || printf '# Memory

Index of topic notes — auto-maintained by the memory-consolidator agent.
' > memory/MEMORY.md
